HGSS.131.0000:
Baoba: It is you!
It must have been a long way.\f
Welcome to the Safari Zone!
It hasn’t been open too long, but you\r
can enjoy all the fun!\f
Please feel free to enjoy my safari!\f
HGSS.131.0001:
Baoba: I will keep upgrading my safari.
I will let you know using Pokégear if I\r
make any changes.\f
HGSS.131.0002:
Safari Zone...\f
It makes me feel like I am in a
foreign country.\r
It brings up a strange feeling.
HGSS.131.0005:
This Safari Zone is great!\f
I just kept going after Pokémon!
That made my JIGGLYPUFF upset though.
HGSS.131.0007:
Safari, safari,
it is so much fun.\f
Safari, safari,
so interesting, huh!\f
So many Pokémon are waiting for us!\f
...That’s a song I made up.
I sing it when I am in the Safari Zone.
HGSS.131.0008:
Airily goes the Safari Ball under the
blue sky. Sprinkly goes your sweat to\r
celebrate a friendship.\f
I love the Safari Zone!\f
...I made a whole jingle out of it.
You think anyone would be interested?
HGSS.131.0009:
I’ve decided to carry Pokémon drinks.\f
This will be new to me, but I will do
my best...\f
HGSS.131.0010:
Oh, you want to buy something?
Can you wait while I get it ready?\f
Just a minute...\r
..................\f
HGSS.131.0012:
There are many Pokémon to choose from,
but nothing beats the cuteness of\r
SLOWPOKE.\f
People often say that I look like one!
HGSS.131.0014:
I have always wanted to catch my first
Pokémon at the Safari Zone.
HGSS.131.0015:
You may be under the impression
there is a sophisticated system to\r
customizing the Safari Zone, right?\f
The real truth is that...
HGSS.131.0016:
Arrrgh...
I am so exhausted...\r
This job uses so much of your energy...
HGSS.131.0017:
Safari Zone\f
This is where everything is thrilling.
Feel free to come by and experience\r
the wild!
